title: Include Logic and Description Fields in CSV and Excel Export
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to export logic and description fields from Metrics in CSV and Excel format, so that I can share metric documentation externally.
description: Add the logic and description fields to the CSV and Excel export functionality for Metrics data. Users need these fields in exported files for offline documentation and sharing.
acceptance_criteria: Logic field is included in CSV export
Logic field is included in Excel export
Description field is included in CSV export
Description field is included in Excel export
ux_changes: Export files now include logic and description columns.
middleware_changes: Updated export query and formatter to include logic and description fields.
comment_summary: Waqar completed the implementation on dev.
